title: BEM-1294 workflow absence guard
objective:
Create file governance/validators/validate_active_governance_workflow_absent.py with content from pathlib import Path

ACTIVE = Path('.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml')
DISABLED_DIR = Path('governance/workflows_disabled')


def main():
    errors = []
    if ACTIVE.exists():
        errors.append('active governance-validation-ci.yml must remain absent until re-enable gate')
    if not DISABLED_DIR.exists():
        errors.append('governance/workflows_disabled directory missing')
    if errors:
        print('FAIL active workflow absence guard')
        for error in errors:
            print(error)
        raise SystemExit(1)
    print('PASS active workflow absence guard')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
